action_set_definitions.name: get_onboarding_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current onboarding progress, document status, and IT account status for a specific employee.

employee_id.description: The unique identifier for the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_hr_documentation
action_set_definitions.description: Signs and submits pending HR documents for the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: get_certification_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Stand-and-Deliver score and certification status.

action_set_definitions.name: activate_it_access
action_set_definitions.description: Activates internal IT accounts and technical systems. ONLY call if certification score is 80+.

action_set_definitions.name: list_available_regions
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of regions that can be queried for lead allocation.

action_set_definitions.name: query_available_leads
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves leads in a specific region, including their type (to identify forbidden leads).

action_set_definitions.name: assign_leads_to_employee
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a list of lead IDs to the employee territory.

action_set_definitions.name: get_pipeline_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current pipeline coverage ratio for the employee.

action_set_definitions.name: update_onboarding_phase
action_set_definitions.description: Finalizes transition to the target phase.

action_set_definitions.name: report_unresolvable_issue
action_set_definitions.description: Escalates the onboarding process if constraints (score/leads) cannot be met.

state_description.employee_id: Unique identifier for the employee being onboarded.
state_description.full_name: The legal name of the employee.
state_description.onboarding_stage: The current phase of the process (e.g., 'Pre-boarding', 'Document Signing', 'IT Setup', 'Orientation', 'Completed').
state_description.documents_signed: A list of HR documents that have been electronically signed.
state_description.it_accounts_active: Flag indicating if email and internal system accounts have been provisioned.
state_description.mentor_assigned: The name of the senior staff member assigned to the new hire.
state_description.hardware_shipped: Whether the laptop and peripherals have been dispatched to the employee.
